lines.speaker: Litlihui, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Nilsal, my child. I hope you are enjoying your time in the valley.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Litlihui, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: I could, but you don't appear to actually need healing right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the giant tree stump all about?

lines.speaker: Litlihui, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Ah, it is quite a sad story I'm afraid. You should speak to my counterpart if you wish to hear it. He tells it better than I.

lines.speaker: Litlihui, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: May the sun light your way, my child.
